evals.prompt: Собери семантическую базу ai_navigation для C:\Axis\CEV-Eris с нуля.
evals.expected_output: Runs Stage 0 assessment (family, subsystems, signals, overlay, tgui), builds only applicable files per file-specs.md in stage order, stamps generated inventories with date+command, validates with the script, registers the base in the workspace registry, plans deployment as <repo>/ai_navigation.

evals.prompt: Мне нужно добавить новую TGUI-панель настроек погоды в C:\Axis\Rivermist-Hollow-Vanderlin. Составь план.
evals.expected_output: Discovers the repo's base via the Discovery protocol (in-repo ai_navigation, then workspace registry), dispatches ss13-tgui for implementation (plus tgstation-modular-content for placement if the fork tracks upstream), produces a binding brief (skill invariants + fork-local facts with source files + verification greps), lets code win over any stale base fact it hits.

evals.prompt: Проверь целостность всех трёх семантических баз и почини найденное.
evals.expected_output: Runs validate_semantic_base.py per base with correct --repo roots, distinguishes real drift from shorthand noise, fixes fast-tier files first, updates stamps, re-syncs deployed copies (diff -rq empty), updates parity notes in integrity.md.

evals.prompt: В C:\Axis\Twilight-Axis проверь, как ManorPanel доставляет изображения в TGUI, и составь binding brief. Используй семантическую базу Twilight и ss13-tgui; файлы не изменяй.
evals.expected_output: Discovers the twilight base through the workspace registry, binds it with ss13-tgui via tgui_guide.md + signal_map.md + coding_standards.md, identifies modular_twilight_axis/manors/code/manor_tgui.dm and tgui/packages/tgui/interfaces/ManorPanel.tsx, verifies /datum/asset/simple/manor + ui_assets() + resolveAsset()/asset mappings, and answers read-only with exact source paths.

evals.prompt: Нужно добавить модульную TGUI-панель торговца в C:\Axis\BandaStation-Kagelite_DEV так, чтобы она пережила следующий upstream sync. С чего начинаем и какие скиллы задействуем?
evals.expected_output: Dispatches both architecture skills with the documented interaction order (tgstation-modular-content decides placement in modular_bandastation, ss13-tgui decides implementation), resolves the repo to its base via the Discovery protocol, and produces a binding brief.

evals.prompt: Представь, что все папки ai_navigation_* удалены. Восстанови инфраструктуру для C:\Axis\Rivermist-Hollow-Vanderlin.
evals.expected_output: Does not panic-copy from memory of old bases; runs its own bootstrap (assessment -> staged build from file-specs), rebuilds, validates, registers, redeploys — demonstrating the recovery property.

evals.prompt: В ss13-tgui написано одно, а в ai_navigation_azure/tgui_guide.md другое про то, как регистрируется интерфейс. Кому верить?
evals.expected_output: Applies the truth hierarchy: code first; base wins on fork-local facts, skill wins on framework invariants; routes the resolved fact to the correct layer (skill enrichment or base fix).

evals.prompt: Оптимизируй горячий proc обработки жидкостей в C:\Axis\CEV-Eris — сервер лагает. Какие скиллы и в каком порядке?
evals.expected_output: Dispatches byond-ss13-coding as the default architecture skill (performance/DM task, no tgui or modular-placement concern on a hard fork), resolves the repo's base if one exists for routing, and produces a binding brief; does not invoke ss13-tgui or tgstation-modular-content.
